creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to ivo from comment #5)

Can you open a new PR for that? We should come up with a strategy to make sure the "plugin" command works. Any help you can provide would be greatly appreciated!

Can I ask which plugin you are trying to install? It would be better if we had the plugins all packaged and discouraged use of the plugin command to ensure that things are kept in sync with the Elastic version, but I understand that may not always be possible.

I will close this ticket for now, but please open the new one for the new issue with the plugin command.
